name: task-decomposition
description: Break down project requirements into granular, actionable tasks with estimates, dependencies, and assignments
objectives: Decompose high-level requirements into atomic, actionable tasks
Estimate effort per task using t-shirt sizing or story points
Assign tasks to team members based on skills and availability
Group tasks into logical milestones or sprints
Identify critical path through dependency chain
prerequisites: Scoping document with defined requirements exists
Team member profiles with skills/capacity available

procedure.description: Split each requirement into implementable work items
commands: PARSE scoping document requirements
SPLIT each requirement into 2-8 hour tasks
ENSURE each task has a single clear deliverable
WRITE task descriptions with context and expected outcome
TAG tasks by type (feature, bug, chore, spike)
procedure.expectedOutput: List of atomic tasks with descriptions and types

commands: APPLY t-shirt sizing (XS/S/M/L/XL) to each task
CONVERT sizes to hour ranges for timeline planning
FLAG tasks needing spike/investigation before estimation
IDENTIFY tasks that could be parallelized
CALCULATE total effort and compare against timeline
procedure.expectedOutput: Tasks with effort estimates and total project effort

commands: MAP predecessor/successor relationships
IDENTIFY blocking dependencies (hard blocks)
NOTE soft dependencies (recommended order)
CALCULATE critical path through dependency graph
FLAG circular dependencies or bottlenecks
procedure.expectedOutput: Dependency graph with critical path identified

procedure.description: Assign tasks to team members and schedule into milestones
commands: CHECK team member availability and current workload
MATCH task requirements to team member skills
DISTRIBUTE work evenly considering capacity
GROUP tasks into milestones or sprint iterations
SET due dates based on dependencies and capacity
procedure.expectedOutput: Assigned task board with milestones and due dates

procedure.description: Create tasks in the project management system
commands: CREATE tasks in projects system with all metadata
SET priorities based on critical path and business value
LINK dependencies between tasks
ASSIGN team members and set due dates
CREATE milestone markers for tracking
procedure.expectedOutput: All tasks created and visible in project board

criteria: Every requirement maps to at least one task
No task exceeds 8 hours of estimated effort
All dependencies are documented and non-circular
Every task has an assignee and due date
Critical path is identified and reasonable

testScenarios.test: Decompose a multi-week feature into tasks
testScenarios.expected: 15-30 tasks with clear dependencies and assignments

testScenarios.test: Decompose when team has limited availability
testScenarios.expected: Tasks scheduled within capacity, bottlenecks flagged

successIndicators: Team agrees assignments are fair and achievable

commonErrors.error: Task too large to estimate accurately
commonErrors.solution: Create a spike task for investigation, then re-decompose
Review dependency chain, identify which can be decoupled
Propose scope reduction or timeline extension with options

escalationCriteria: Effort exceeds timeline by >50% with no scope flexibility
Key skills not available on team for critical tasks
Requirements too ambiguous to decompose further

successMetrics.name: Decomposition Coverage
successMetrics.measurement: Requirements with mapped tasks vs total requirements

successMetrics.name: Estimate Accuracy
successMetrics.measurement: Actual hours vs estimated hours per task

agentInterfaces.message: Create tasks in project system from decomposition
Verify team capacity and skill matching for assignments
